provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality.name: provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality
provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality.description: The person provides proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

is_alien.name: is_alien
is_alien.description: The person is an alien because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

is_union_citizen.name: is_union_citizen
is_union_citizen.description: The person is a Union citizen.

enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement.name: enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement
enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in Article 2 point 5 of the Schengen Borders Code.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not enjoying the Community right of free movement.

is_present_on_territory.name: is_present_on_territory
is_present_on_territory.description: The alien is present on the territory.

meets_conditions_for_entry_or_stay.name: meets_conditions_for_entry_or_stay
meets_conditions_for_entry_or_stay.description: The alien meets the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

stay_is_illegal.name: stay_is_illegal
stay_is_illegal.description: The alien's stay is illegal: they are present on the territory and do not or no longer meet the conditions for entry or stay.

is_subject_of_removal_procedure.name: is_subject_of_removal_procedure
is_subject_of_removal_procedure.description: The alien is the subject of a removal procedure.

is_subject_of_international_protection_p.name: is_subject_of_international_protection_procedure
is_subject_of_international_protection_p.description: The alien is the subject of a procedure for the granting of international protection.

is_subject_of_dublin_transfer_procedure.name: is_subject_of_dublin_transfer_procedure
is_subject_of_dublin_transfer_procedure.description: The alien is the subject of a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

reasons_to_believe_will_abscond.name: reasons_to_believe_will_abscond
reasons_to_believe_will_abscond.description: There are reasons to believe that the alien will abscond.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the person concerned has been performed.

risk_is_current_and_real.name: risk_is_current_and_real
risk_is_current_and_real.description: The risk of absconding is current and real as referred to in paragraph 1 point 11.

subject_to_qualifying_procedure.name: subject_to_qualifying_procedure
subject_to_qualifying_procedure.description: The alien is the subject of a removal procedure, an international protection procedure, or a Dublin transfer procedure.

at_least_one_objective_criterion_met.name: at_least_one_objective_criterion_met
at_least_one_objective_criterion_met.description: At least one of the objective criteria in paragraph 2 is met for the person.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: A risk of absconding exists for the alien.

possesses_valid_travel_document.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
possesses_valid_travel_document.description: The alien is in possession of a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

recognised_as_national_by_own_authority.name: recognised_as_national_by_own_authority
recognised_as_national_by_own_authority.description: The alien has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country.

national_authority_willing_to_issue_lais.name: national_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
national_authority_willing_to_issue_lais.description: The national authority of the alien's country has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_within_nationality_category_for_mi.name: falls_within_nationality_category_for_ministerial_laissez_passer
falls_within_nationality_category_for_mi.description: The alien falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

is_identified_alien.name: is_identified_alien
is_identified_alien.description: The alien is an identified alien under one of the three identification grounds.

criterion_1_met.name: criterion_1_met
criterion_1_met.description: Objective criterion paragraph 2 point 1 is met: no residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay, or no international protection application within the statutory time limit.

no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.description: The person has not submitted a residence application following their illegal entry or during their illegal stay.

no_international_protection_application_.name: no_international_protection_application_within_time_limit
no_international_protection_application_.description: The person has not made their application for international protection within the time limit provided for by the Act.

criterion_2_met.name: criterion_2_met
criterion_2_met.description: Objective criterion paragraph 2 point 2 is met: use of false information, false documents, fraud, or other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

used_false_or_misleading_information.name: used_false_or_misleading_information
used_false_or_misleading_information.description: The person has used false or misleading information in the context of a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

used_false_or_falsified_documents.name: used_false_or_falsified_documents
used_false_or_falsified_documents.description: The person has used false or falsified documents in the context of a relevant procedure.

committed_fraud_in_procedure.name: committed_fraud_in_procedure
committed_fraud_in_procedure.description: The person has committed fraud in the context of a relevant procedure.

used_other_unlawful_means.name: used_other_unlawful_means
used_other_unlawful_means.description: The person has used other unlawful means in the context of a relevant procedure.

criterion_3_met.name: criterion_3_met
criterion_3_met.description: Objective criterion paragraph 2 point 3 is met: non-cooperation with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal.

does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with the authorities responsible for implementation of or supervision of compliance with regulations concerning access, residence, establishment, and removal of aliens.

criterion_4_met.name: criterion_4_met
criterion_4_met.description: Objective criterion paragraph 2 point 4 is met: declared unwillingness or actual failure to comply with a transfer, refusal of entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, liberty-restricting, or equivalent Member State measure.

declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_me.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_measure
declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_me.description: The person has made clear that they do not wish to comply with a transfer measure, refusal of entry measure, removal measure, entry ban, less coercive measure, liberty-restricting measure, or equivalent measure from another Member State.

failed_to_comply_with_measure.name: failed_to_comply_with_measure
failed_to_comply_with_measure.description: The person has already failed to comply with a transfer measure, refusal of entry measure, removal measure, entry ban, less coercive measure, liberty-restricting measure, or equivalent measure from another Member State.

criterion_5_met.name: criterion_5_met
criterion_5_met.description: Objective criterion paragraph 2 point 5 is met: the person is subject to an active entry ban in the Kingdom or another Member State.

subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_kingdom.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_kingdom
subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_kingdom.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_other_mem.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_other_member_state
subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_other_mem.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

criterion_6_met.name: criterion_6_met
criterion_6_met.description: Objective criterion paragraph 2 point 6 is met: new application submitted immediately after a negative decision or enforcement measure.

submitted_new_application_after_negative.name: submitted_new_application_after_negative_decision
submitted_new_application_after_negative.description: The person has submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, a decision terminating stay, or a refusal of entry or removal measure.

criterion_7_met.name: criterion_7_met
criterion_7_met.description: Objective criterion paragraph 2 point 7 is met: concealment of prior fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State when questioned.

concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_st.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_st.description: The person, while being questioned, concealed the fact that they had already provided fingerprints in another State bound by European regulations on determining the State responsible for examining an application for international protection.

criterion_8_met.name: criterion_8_met
criterion_8_met.description: Objective criterion paragraph 2 point 8 is met: multiple international protection or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.description: The person has submitted multiple applications for international protection or residence in the Kingdom or in one or more other Member States and those applications have given rise to a negative decision or have not resulted in the issuance of a residence permit.

criterion_9_met.name: criterion_9_met
criterion_9_met.description: Objective criterion paragraph 2 point 9 is met: concealment of a prior international protection application in another Dublin-bound State when questioned.

concealed_prior_protection_application_i.name: concealed_prior_protection_application_in_other_state
concealed_prior_protection_application_i.description: The person, while being questioned, concealed the fact that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by European regulations on determining the State responsible for examining such an application.

criterion_10_met.name: criterion_10_met
criterion_10_met.description: Objective criterion paragraph 2 point 10 is met: the person came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

came_for_purposes_other_than_application.name: came_for_purposes_other_than_application
came_for_purposes_other_than_application.description: The person declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

criterion_11_met.name: criterion_11_met
criterion_11_met.description: Objective criterion paragraph 2 point 11 is met: the person is subject to a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The person is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.
